_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Recognize and accurately report forensic artifacts indicative of a particular operating system.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in mapping personal data flows across systems, vendors, and jurisdictions to produce records of processing activities (RoPA) in compliance with regulatory requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-006 (RC, cosine: 0.395), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.394).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.334). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [accurately, artifacts, forensic, indicative, operating, particular] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, activities, compliance, data, flows, jurisdictions] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.871, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Recognize and accurately report forensic artifacts indicative of a particular op" and "Skill in mapping personal data flows across systems, vendors, and jurisdictions" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.405 > STS 0.334 (gap +0.070). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.2%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [accurately, artifacts, forensic, indicative, operating, particular]. WIDAI terms: [across, activities, compliance, data, flows, jurisdictions].
